evals.name: Waitrose Default Test
evals.prompt: Collate these ingredients into a shopping list for Waitrose: Milk (4pt), Cheddar cheese, Butter/Spread, Eggs, Potatoes, Onions, Carrots, Broccoli, Bananas, Apples, Salad leaves/Lettuce, Chicken breasts/thighs, Beef mince, Sausages, Tinned tuna, Baked beans, Loaf of bread, Pasta, Rice, Porridge oats, Cereal, Tea bags, Coffee, Tinned chopped tomatoes, Pasta sauce, Cooking oil, Salt/Pepper, Biscuits, Frozen peas, Frozen mixed vegetables, Toilet paper, Kitchen roll, Shampoo, Toothpaste, Dish soap/Dishwasher tablets.
evals.expected_output: A categorised list of real Waitrose products with weights and prices.
